name: Unauthorized ICS Device Access
description: Detects connections to ICS devices from unauthorized sources
query:
// ICS Unauthorized Access Detection (NDR)
// Connections to ICS device ports on industrial protocols
events from ndr_flow
where destination_port in (502, 20000, 44818, 47808, 2404, 102)
  and protocol in ("modbus", "dnp3", "bacnet", "opcua", "enip", "iec104")
group by source_ip, destination_ip
having count(*) >= 1
within 60 seconds
